name: hpt-su
description: Search the hpt.su registry of Russian/EAEU vehicle compliance documents (type approvals ОТТС/СБКТС/ОТШ, conformity certificates, declarations, СУТ type-approval notifications).
long_description: MCP server that connects any MCP-compatible AI assistant to https://hpt.su — an aggregated database of Russian Federation and Eurasian Economic Union vehicle compliance documents. Search vehicle type approvals (ОТТС, ОТШ), safety-of-design certificates (СБКТС), conformity certificates and declarations under TR CU / TR EAEU technical regulations, and type-approval notifications (СУТ). Requires a X-API-Key from a hpt.su account with an MCP_FREE or MCP_PAID scope.

api_key.title: hpt.su API key
api_key.description: X-API-Key from the hpt.su cabinet (requires MCP_FREE or MCP_PAID scope).

tools.name: get_document
tools.description: Fetch a single Document by slug + kind.

tools.name: search_zotts
tools.description: ЗОТТС — закрытые type approvals на ТС.

tools.name: search_zotch
tools.description: ЗОТШ — закрытые type approvals на шасси.

tools.name: search_by_vin
tools.description: Cross-kind поиск документов по части VIN.

tools.name: fulltext_search
tools.description: Полнотекстовый поиск по type-approval kinds (требует подписки).

tools.name: list_document_files
tools.description: Файлы документа по kind + slug (kind обязателен — slug не уникален между kinds).

tools.name: list_vehicle_models
tools.description: Модели ТС с фильтром по бренду.
